name: Mashed Potatoes with Leeks ( July 1997)
recipeIngredient: 2 medium leeks (white and pale green parts only), thinly sliced
salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash leeks very well in running water. Drain in a colander.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a saucepan and add leeks. Cook until wilted.
3. Stir in potatoes. Cook, stirring for 2 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Add 1 cup boiling water and simmer, covered, until potatoes are almost cooked.
6. Uncover the pan and continue cooking until all liquid has evaporated.
7. Mash the potatoes and leeks, add 1 tablespoon butter, and mash some more.
Stir in cream.
